title: More Nonsense Limerick 75
content:
There is a young lady, whose nose,
    Continually prospers and grows;
    When it grew out of sight, 
    She exclaimed in a fright,
    "Oh! Farewell to the end of my nose!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 75", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
